summary: There was a statistically significant spike in adverse event reports for hydrochlorothiazide on 2022-11-17, with 59 reports received compared to an expected 38.08 based on Holt-Winters forecasting.
notable_pattern: Reports from this time window often involved elderly patients (ages 79-87) taking multiple medications, including hydrochlorothiazide, and experienced severe or life-threatening adverse events.
confidence_caveat: This signal is based on a limited sample of 8 reports and should be further investigated before any clinical conclusions can be drawn.
